study: Sangram SG-SE-002 (Номинатив и аккузатив) — two largest cases; native totals + deprel-subset function split
kind: beyond-quota core ① (opening set already 19/19); native positive; workflow-probed + adversarially verified

snapshot.provenance_note: pin 04e0778 orphaned; binding = provenance table + SHA-256 + tag c3-pin-04e0778-content

totals_native.note: Nom and Acc are the two largest of the eight vibhakti; feat_case='Cpd' (841052, compound-member placeholder, not a case) is LARGER than Acc and is excluded from the 'largest case' claim

nominative_function_deprel_subset.note: subject↔Nom near-canonical on the parsed subset; non-Nom nsubj include Loc (the locative-absolute subject, SG-SE-005) and Gen

accusative_function_deprel_subset.note: the accusative reaches beyond the direct object: goal of motion (obl:goal), duration/time (obl:temp), path (obl:path) — all natively tagged; obj is ~90% Acc (rest Cpd/Gen)

double_accusative_CORRECTED.note: the classical double-OBJECT (dvikarmaka) is ~872 verb heads (>=2 Acc in core-object roles obj/iobj/xcomp/ccomp), NOT the naive 2747 (which mixes object + adverbial/directional/temporal/coordinated Acc). The adversarial verify caught this ~3x over-count; 36 heads have two true `obj` deps (e.g. yāc 'ask X for Y').

traditional_layer.witness: Whitney 1889 §§267-281 (nominative, accusative uses; accusative of goal/duration; double accusative); Pāṇini 1.4.49 (karman), 1.4.51 (dvikarmaka), 2.3.2 (Acc)

limits.function_subset_only: deprel covers only ~3.93%% of tokens; ALL function splits (nsubj/obj/obl/iobj/predicate-nom/double-acc) are on that subset and must not be generalised to the whole case
limits.obj_not_acc: 'direct object' (obj) and 'accusative' (feat_case) are distinct layers: ~10%% of obj are Cpd/Gen, not Acc
limits.double_acc_definition_sensitive: the double accusative depends on the deprel filter; the genuine dvikarmaka is ~872, not the naive 2747
limits.cpd_larger_than_acc: feat_case='Cpd' (841052) outranks Acc; 'two largest cases' excludes the compound-member placeholder
limits.pin: orphaned 04e0778, bound by provenance table + SHA-256 + tag
